data.title: CI Global Asset Management Holds Significant Ethereum Stake in ETF
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CI Global Asset Management has a substantial holding of Ethereum in its ETHX ETF, valued at approximately $620.61 million. Of this amount, $130 million worth of Ethereum is staked, while the remaining $490.85 million is not staked. This indicates a strategic approach by CI Global Asset Management in managing its cryptocurrency assets within the ETF.

data.title: Citizens: ETH is expected to break through $7,000 next year and gives SharpLink an "outperform" rating
data.description: Investment bank Citizens has initiated coverage of Ethereum treasury company SharpLink Gaming (SBET), giving it an "outperform" rating and a $50 price target, and said its stock price has potential upside of more than 200%. Citizens' bullish stance on SBET is reportedly based on its long-term optimistic view of ETH's price trend, predicting that ETH will exceed $7,000 by 2026 and may exceed $20,000 by 2030. (CoinDesk)

data.title: The whale that opened a $140 million short position yesterday has now placed $156 million in long positions on BTC and ETH.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the whale address that opened a $140 million BTC short position yesterday (which had previously closed its short position and switched to long) now holds $156 million in long positions in both ETH and BTC, surpassing yesterday's short position size. These positions include: BTC 5x leverage long position: $77.03 million (699.46 coins) at an opening price of $110,725.60; ETH 3x leverage long position: $79.25 million (19,894.21 coins) at an opening price of $4,037.43.

data.title: SOL Price Watch: Solana Price Falls 3% as Whale Activity Sparks Pressure, Now Trading Below $195
data.description: Key TakeawaysSolana price drops over 3%, underperforming broader crypto market decline of 0.37%Over $192M in whale transfers to exchanges adds selling pressure on SOLTechnical breakdown below $195 and 30-day SMA ($216) weakens bullish structure Crypto Market Risk-Off Mood Hits AltcoinsThe Altcoin Season Index has plunged to 28/100, reflecting high risk aversion towards altcoins. Meanwhile, Bitcoin dominance rose to 58.72%.Source: CoinMarketCapThe Crypto Fear & Greed Index fell to 32, confirming a low-confidence environment across digital assets. This macro backdrop amplified selling in Solana, despite long-term catalysts such as ETF developments and DeFi staking activity. Technical Indicators Confirm Bearish MomentumSolana’s technical setup shows clear weakness after breaking below the $200 psychological support and its 30-day SMA at $216.55. Key metrics:Source: TradingViewAll indicators point to bearish momentum and low trend strength, while funding rate for SOL/USDT perpetuals sits at -0.0052%, signaling short pressure in derivatives markets.On the moving average side, SOL is trading below key levels.This places SOL in a technical breakdown phase, with short- and mid-term trends turning negative. ETF Optimism vs. On-Chain WeaknessDespite short-term weakness, ETF developments continue to support Solana’s long-term outlook. Bitwise recently amended its Solana ETF filing to include staking and lower fees to 0.20%, aiming to meet SEC expectations.Still, JPMorgan analysts warn of modest inflows, citing weak on-chain engagement and DeFi TVL declines. This creates a split between institutional optimism and actual user activity, and this may be an ongoing theme as Q4 continues. SOL Outlook: Key Levels and Risk Zones to WatchSOL is now consolidating below or around $202.90 (EMA 10). Bulls must reclaim $212.24 (SMA 20) to shift momentum. A break above this level could target $225 and $237.79 in a bullish scenario.However, failure to hold above $195 risks a slide to $190, then $180, with deeper support near $173.71 (SMA 200).

data.title: Fed Governor Milan: Not concerned about asset price bubbles when pushing for rate cuts
data.description: Federal Reserve Board member Milan said that when pushing for interest rate cuts, he is not concerned about asset price bubbles. The most important financial conditions for the economy are not market-related. (Jinshi)

data.title: Citizens Bank Rates SharpLink Gaming as Outperform with Significant Upside Potential
data.description: According to BlockBeats, investment bank Citizens has initiated coverage on Ethereum treasury company SharpLink Gaming (SBET), assigning it an 'outperform' rating with a target price of $50. This suggests a potential upside of over 200% for the stock. Citizens' optimistic stance on SBET is driven by a long-term positive outlook on Ethereum's price trajectory, forecasting that ETH could surpass $7,000 by 2026 and potentially exceed $20,000 by 2030.

data.title: Delin invests $200 million in strategic partnership with Antalpha, a subsidiary of Bitmain
data.description: Deling Holdings (1709.HK) announced a comprehensive strategic partnership with Antalpha, a digital asset financial services platform, valued at up to $200 million. The partnership involves tokenizing gold assets and developing Bitcoin computing infrastructure. Deling has already delivered its initial $5 million investment in Tether Gold (XAU₮) and plans to acquire and distribute up to $100 million in XAU₮ over the next 12 months. Deling is also simultaneously planning a Bitcoin mining investment of up to $100 million. Deling has already completed the initial procurement of thousands of high-performance mining machines and has formed a strategic alliance with Antalpha to strengthen its upstream computing power footprint, aiming to become Asia's leading publicly listed Bitcoin mining company.

data.title: Tom Lee: The bubble of digital asset treasury companies may have burst
data.description: In a video for Fortune magazine's latest "Crypto Playbook," BitMine Chairman Tom Lee suggests the bubble for digital asset treasury companies may have burst. While Ethereum has struggled at times in recent years amid the proliferation of other blockchains and its own technical challenges, Lee argues that Ethereum remains "Wall Street's blockchain," particularly as financial firms explore applications for stablecoins and various tokenized assets (many of which are native to Ethereum). Lee noted that as more digital asset treasury companies enter the public markets, many are already trading at a discount to their net asset value (NAV), or the value of their underlying cryptocurrency holdings. "If that's not a bubble burst, then what is?" she asked. (Fortune)

data.title: Fed Governor Waller: I don't think it's necessary to lower monetary policy below neutral
data.description: Federal Reserve Board Governor Waller said he does not believe it is necessary to lower monetary policy below a neutral level. He said that large deficits are unsustainable in the long run, and that a stable fiscal policy is the best way to lower yields. (Jinshi)

data.title: Yesterday, the $140 million short BTC whale’s BTC and ETH long positions have exceeded $100 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, the scale of BTC and ETH long orders of the whale who shorted BTC for $140 million yesterday has exceeded $100 million, and currently reached $114 million, of which ETH long orders are $71.83 million and BTC long orders are $43.03 million, with a cumulative floating loss of $400,000.

data.title: ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT and DOGE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.56, funding rate: 0.0041%.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.98, funding rate: 0.0012%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.60, funding rate: -0.0052%.BNB/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.19, funding rate: 0.0000%.DOGE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.78, funding rate: 0.0041%.

data.title: BlackRock Launches BSTBL, a GENIUS Act-Compliant Money Market Fund
data.description: BlackRock announced the official launch of the BlackRock Select Treasury Based Liquidity Fund's (BSTBL), a GENIUS Act-compliant money market fund. The fund can serve as a reserve asset for payment stablecoin issuers to further enhance liquidity. The fund will also reportedly extend its trading deadline from 2:30 p.m. ET to 5:00 p.m. ET, providing more investment opportunities. (Businesswire)

data.title: Over the past hour, the entire network has experienced a liquidation of over $28 million, mainly due to long orders.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of US$28.3129 million, of which long positions had a liquidation of US$24.0661 million and short positions had a liquidation of US$4.2468 million.

data.title: Canaan Inc. has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum share price listing requirements
data.description: Canaan Inc. announced that it has received a written compliance notice from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC Listing Qualifications Department dated October 15, 2025, confirming that the company's American Depositary Shares (ADSs) have regained compliance with the minimum closing price requirement of US$1.00 per share set forth in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(a)(1) (the "Minimum Price Requirement"). Nasdaq has determined that Canaan Inc.'s ADSs have closed at or above US$1.00 for ten consecutive trading days from October 1 to October 15, 2025. Therefore, the matter has been closed and the company has returned to full compliance. (PRNewswire)
